This was the first ever final for both England and Venezuela in the history of the tournament.", "Dominic Calvert-Lewin | Dominic Nathaniel Calvert-Lewin (born 16 March 1997) is an English professional footballer who plays as a forward for Premier League club Everton and the England under-21 team.", "Ludvy Vaillant | Ludvy Vaillant (born 15 March 1995 in Fort-de-France, Martinique) is a French athlete competing primarily in the 400 metres hurdles. The final was contested by Venezuela and England. England won the match 1–0, winning the title for the first time. Dominic Calvert-Lewin scored his second goal of the tournament during the final, which turned out to be the only goal in the game. This was the first ever final for both England and Venezuela in the history of the tournament.»
